purpose: Capture near-term acute deterioration in political risk beyond the narrower irregular-transition target.
positive_when: the next month or one of the next three months reaches the acute political-risk proxy threshold
the threshold is driven by a combination of high-severity episodes, fragmentation or regime-vulnerability linkage, event shock, and/or external-economic deterioration
exclusions: this target is broader than irregular transition and should not be interpreted as a coup or transfer target
it is a deterioration-watch target, not yet an adjudicated or gold-standard outcome
next_workflow_steps: review proxy positives country by country
build dedicated fit dataset and validation path
